LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret.description: A simple green beret usually worn by officers of the NCR army. It mainly serves as an insignia of rank but offers a fair bit of protection against the weather.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret.label: NCR Beret
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret_1st_Recon.descript: A red beret worn by the members of the famed 1st recon battalion. They are renowned as some of the best snipers the republic can muster. Fittingly, their motto is: “the last thing you never see.”
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Beret_1st_Recon.label: NCR First Recon Beret
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Goggles_Helmet: A trooper helmet with goggles and a piece of fabric attached to it. The fabric can be wrapped around the face to protect the wearer against the dust storms that are common in parts of the Mojave.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Helmet.descrip: A trooper helmet with goggles and a piece of fabric attached to it. The fabric can be wrapped around the face to protect the wearer against the dust storms that are common in parts of the Mojave.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Face_Wrap_Helmet.label: Face Wrap Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_General_Cap.description: A cap adorned with the two-headed bear, the heraldic animal of the New California Republic. It serves as a symbol of rank for the republic’s generals and is usually reserved for them.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_General_Cap.label: NCR General Cap
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Goggles_Helmet.descripti: A cheap, mass-produced helmet worn by the NCR’s s老旧iers. This version comes with a pair of goggles attached which provide additional, albeit modest, protection for the wearer’s eyes.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Goggles_Helmet.label: Goggles Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_MP_Helmet.description: A helmet with goggles usually worn by the members of the NCR military police. Like the uniform itself, it gives it’s wearer an aura of authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_MP_Helmet.label: MP Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Brown.descrip: A brown cowboy hat favoured by the NCR rangers. It’s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Brown.label: NCR Brown Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Grey.descript: A grey cowboy hat favoured by the NCR rangers. It’s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Grey.label: NCR Grey Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Patrol.descri: A simple cowboy hat favoured by the desert rangers, especially those patrolling the Mojave. It’s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Patrol.label: NCR Patrol Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Tan.descripti: A tan cowboy hat favoured by the NCR rangers. It’s useful for protecting the wearer against the relentless heat of the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Ranger_Hat_Tan.label: NCR Tan Ranger Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Salvaged_Power_Armor_Hel: A T-45 power armor helmet usually worn paired with the NCR's salvaged power armors. Despite its salvaged nature, it offers excellent protection and, in contrast to the armor itself, has no major drawbacks compared to a regular power armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Helmet.descripti: The standard helmet of the NCR armed forces. It is mass-produced in the NCR and easy to make and maintain but offers only marginal protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Trooper_Helmet.label: Trooper Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCR_Veteran_Ranger_Helmet.de: An enclosed military helmet with built-in low light optics and a gas mask worn by NCR Rangers. It offers better protection in comparison to the Trooper helmet but is significantly rarer.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Helmet.descripti: A riot helmet once worn by the guards of the NCRCF. Like many other parts of their gear, it has been apprehended by the Powder Gangers. It offers good protection, especially against blunt damage.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_NCRCF_Guard_Helmet.label: NCRCF Guard Helmet
